concept: Dare to create an adventure game where players control a detective with the ability to perceive and interact with the emotional residue left behind at locations where intense feelings occurred. Crime scenes contain emotional imprints that reveal different aspects of events depending on which emotional frequency the detective attunes to - fear shows escape routes, anger reveals violent actions, while sadness highlights personal connections and losses. Environmental challenges involve navigating areas saturated with hazardous emotional residue that affects the detective's own emotional state and subsequent perceptive abilities. Advanced techniques include combining multiple emotional frequencies to reveal complex motivational patterns invisible in single-emotion analysis. The ultimate mystery involves an emotionally void location that shouldn't possibly exist, hiding a truth about reality that challenges the fundamental nature of consciousness.
